title: Oceanopolis
description: Various boats and raft structures that spawn in ocean biomes
body:
Oceanopolis adds various different boats and rafts that spawn in the world containing driftwood crates

 

These crates can be broken to spawn a specific set of items from a custom loot table

 

Mainly create for the seaopolis 2 modpack but can be used stand alone

 

Adds driftwood logs, planks, stairs, slabs, doors, fences and gates~

Join the discord to report bugs issues suggestions

https://discord.gg/f92STFGN32
